name: EZPAWN
description_short: Dallas, TX EZPAWN at 3311 S Lancaster Rd offers fast pawn loans and gold buying.
description_long:
The EZPAWN location at 3311 S Lancaster Road in Dallas, TX serves the South Dallas community with convenient pawn services. Located in a standalone storefront in this busy commercial area, this Dallas branch is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturday 9AM to 6PM, and Sunday noon to 5PM. The location offers easy access for Dallas residents needing quick cash or a place to sell valuables.

This Dallas, TX pawn shop specializes in pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles, plus gold and precious metal buying. The staff at the 3311 S Lancaster location can be reached at 214-372-4900 to discuss specific items or get a quote before visiting. Same-day approvals are typical for straightforward transactions at this Dallas location.

If you're a Dallas resident considering a pawn loan or sale, bring a photo ID and be prepared to discuss what you're pawning. The S Lancaster location has handled everything from electronics to jewelry for South Dallas customers. Visit during business hours to see current inventory and explore your options.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on every pawn, buy, and sell transaction with online account management
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value online before visiting the store
Accepts firearms (rifles, shotguns, handguns) as loan collateral at select stores, including this location
On-site precious metal testing ensures fair, accurate gold and diamond pricing
Layaway available year-round with just 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Extended retail hours Mon–Sat 9am–7pm; open Sundays 12pm–5pm
Auto loans available as a special service category at this Las Vegas location
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and fee schedules are not disclosed on the website; must visit in-store for terms
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (relevant for multi-state customers)
Firearm redemption requires a background check unless exempted by law, adding a step to reclaim collateral
Appraisal amounts for firearms are at sole discretion of each location with no published rate guidance
Not all services (e.g., Take Today financing, Jewelry VIP) are available at every store location
best_for: Las Vegas residents needing immediate cash against electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at 25–70% below retail
Gun owners looking to use firearms as short-term loan collateral
Shoppers who want layaway or installment financing on a used item without a credit check
diagnosis: EZPAWN Las Vegas is best suited for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers who need fast liquidity against a physical asset, or budget shoppers hunting discounted used merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are opaque online and typically carry high effective APRs—this should be a last resort for cash needs, not a primary borrowing strategy.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, any item in working condition)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with on-site metal testing
Firearms loans and outright purchases (rifles, shotguns, handguns)
Auto loans (special category at this location)
Pre-owned brand-name retail merchandise at 25–70% off retail
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on pawn, redeem, buy, sell transactions)
Take Today third-party financing (up to 12 months)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
meta_description: Dallas, TX EZPAWN pawn loans and gold buying at 3311 S Lancaster Rd. Fast approvals, open Mon-Fri 9AM-7PM, Sat 9AM-6PM, Sun 12-5PM.
